beginner.label: Beginner
beginner.useWhen: AM wants plain-language guidance and one decision at a time.
behavior: Explain each checkpoint in one or two lines.
Ask one decision at a time.
Avoid slash commands unless showing a copy-paste fallback.
Use Green/Yellow/Red receipt labels with the narrative paragraph.
End each checkpoint with the exact next prompt.

standard.label: Standard
behavior: Speak the receipt narrative paragraph, then show the four color-coded provider bullets.
Show decision plus headline reason; expand to full evidence only on Yellow/Red or when AM asks.
Use natural prompts first and slash commands only as traceability.
Show trust panels after major checkpoints.

power.label: Power
power.useWhen: AI-native AM wants speed and direct control.
behavior: Suppress the narrative paragraph; show only the four color-coded provider bullets plus headline.
Accept slash commands and compact natural prompts.
Keep receipts concise but never skip approval gates.
Show source/evidence only when it affects the decision or the AM asks.

firstRunStations.label: Account Safety Check
firstRunStations.goal: Confirm the right company and prevent duplicate Day AI Organizations.

firstRunStations.label: Research
firstRunStations.goal: Build myRA-specific account understanding and buyer hypotheses.

firstRunStations.label: Contacts
firstRunStations.goal: Compare imported, Apollo, Freshsales, and Day AI candidates before approval.

firstRunStations.label: Cadence And Draft
firstRunStations.goal: Create a branching action plan and one reviewable draft.

firstRunStations.label: Day AI Health Snapshot
firstRunStations.goal: Confirm what was saved and identify the next best action.

examples: pick up where i left off
is this already in day ai
did this save to day ai
show what was saved to day ai

green.label: Green
green.meaning: Safe to proceed or already saved.
examples: Day AI write returned a record ID.

yellow.label: Yellow
yellow.meaning: AM decision needed before write or next action.
examples: Contacts need AM selection before canonicalization.

red.label: Red
red.meaning: Stop and review; do not create or send.
examples: Day AI write failed and is pending sync.

contactCardTiers.recommended: Strong role fit and evidence; ask AM to approve/enrich/verify.
contactCardTiers.maybe: Useful but incomplete evidence; ask AM whether to keep, enrich, or skip.
contactCardTiers.hold: Weak fit, duplicate risk, bad email, or ambiguous company evidence.

pendingSync.retryPrompt: Retry pending Day AI sync for this account using the same idempotency key.
